title: Resolve, Regarding Legislative Review of Chapter 2:  Fees for Muay Thai Contests and Authorized Participants, a Major Substantive Rule of the Combat Sports Authority of Maine
last_house_action: 4/15/2025 - This being an emergency measure, a two-thirds vote of all the members elected to the House was necessary. FINALLY PASSED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 4/29/2025 - On motion by Senator ROTUNDO of Androscoggin taken from the Special Appropriations Table Subsequently, the Resolve was FINALLY PASSED - Emergency 2/3 Elected Required in concurrence

actions.description: Reported by Representative GERE for the Combat Sports Authority of Maine pursuant to the Maine Revised Statutes, Title 5, section 8072. Received by the Clerk of the House on January 23, 2025. The Resolve was REFERRED to the Committee on HOUSING AND ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT pursuant to Joint Rule 308.2 and ordered printed.
Carried over, in the same posture, to the next special or regular session of the 132nd Legislature, pursuant to Joint Order SP 519.

CONSENT CALENDAR - FIRST DAY Under suspension of the rules CONSENT CALENDAR - SECOND DAY. The Resolve was PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED as Amended by Committee Amendment "A" (H-37) . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.

Report READ and ACCEPTED , in concurrence. READ ONCE . Committee Amendment "A" (H-37) READ and ADOPTED , in concurrence. Under suspension of the Rules, READ A SECOND TIME and PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED AS AMENDED BY Committee Amendment "A" (H-37), in concurrence. Ordered sent down forthwith.
This being an emergency measure, a two-thirds vote of all the members elected to the House was necessary. FINALLY PASSED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
On motion by Senator ROTUNDO of Androscoggin PLACED ON THE SPECIAL APPROPRIATIONS TABLE pending FINAL PASSAGE
On motion by Senator ROTUNDO of Androscoggin taken from the Special Appropriations Table Subsequently, the Resolve was FINALLY PASSED - Emergency 2/3 Elected Required in concurrence
